{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/permafrost.png
|block_health=6.5
|tool=[[Shover]]
|rotation=stairs
}}

Permafrost is a soil that hosts cold grass.

== Obtaining ==
Permafrost can be found in a variety of cold biomes, either as grass blocks or in ground patches.
Breaking cold grass will drop permafrost blocks.

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Soil]]
